untranslatable_reason: Signal relies on shadow-to-breakout price ratio compared against Table 5.3 median values, and pattern-specific success rates (bull/bear %). These external reference tables and pattern classification logic cannot be expressed with standard indicators. The exact breakout price threshold and median shadow comparison metric are not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted to approximate using upper_wick/lower_wick as shadow proxies and atr_14 for relative sizing. Volume trend direction inferred via vol_ratio_20. Exit uses SMA_20 as reasonable reversal condition when signal direction uncertain. However, the core logic—comparing actual shadow heights to a specific reference table and evaluating pattern-dependent success rates—cannot be fully translated without access to the underlying pattern database and Table 5.3.
